programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: It's the unsolved air piracy case in history. A man hijacks a Northwest Orient Airlines flight, demanding 4 parachutes and $200,000. He jumps off the plane with the money and is never seen again.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle-and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: The clock is ticking with only days remaining in python season. Pickle seeks validation from Troy on her tracking skills. Bruce must hunt alone in Zak's absence.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle-and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of Wwii
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal To Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal To Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the Fellowship uncovers more of the mysterious structure in the swamp, artefacts within it suggest it could be a vault with a compelling history.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: 1942: Philippine Resistance: Refusal To Surrender
programme.desc: Gen MacArthur famously promised that 'I shall return' before retreating but this was possible only with Filipino guerrillas bravely fighting on.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
programme.desc: Archaeologists have spent centuries searching for the locations of holy births, deaths, miracles, and wars. In this episode, we explore the stories behind these lost sites and the endeavours to find them.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro confronts minus 40 weather, a broken sled, and exhausted dogs on the Iditarod Trail while running down the frozen Yukon River. Bret and Ivy make an impressive haul of beaver to finish their season.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny
programme.desc: Forget the moon or the stars-every government has even bigger designs in the race to dominate the sky. Uncover a plane crash in North Carolina that almost triggered nuclear Armageddon.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team searches Scatarie Island for the Feversham's lost fortune. Battling brutal currents, they uncover artefacts that may lead to treasure.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: Ronnie moves his lines into the cypress swamps but soon finds himself going toe-to-toe with the King of the Swamp. Ashley gambles on a journey deep into unfamiliar territory behind a locked gate.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo
programme.desc: From priceless treasure found inside a lost city to an ancient manuscript hidden behind a wall, we explore secrets lost deep inside various unseen chambers, like tunnels, caves, or even burial sites.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As the season begins to change, one participant is forced to take on a massive project. Meanwhile, a pack of wolves interrupts the tranquility of the Arctic night and spells trouble for one survivalist.

programme.title: Johor Military Force
programme.desc: The Royal Johor Military Force is tasked with guarding the state of Johor and its king. Believed to be Malaysia's oldest and only state army, it has played pivotal roles in many historical events.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World
programme.desc: In an early 20th-century America where soda is synonymous with cola, small-time soda maker Charles Leiper Grigg dares to take on corporate giants by introducing something entirely new.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World
programme.desc: After being kicked out of the family business by his father, Forrest Mars claws his way back to create a multi-sector global empire, Mars Inc. Today that empire is worth over $47 billion dollars.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: What could lie beyond the confines of the Milky Way? Are there galaxies similar to our own? Could they be capable of sustaining intelligent life? And is that life trying to contact us.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: Graves, tombs, cremations are respectful ways to provide the deceased with a resting place. Is it possible that some of these practices can preserve the soul for eternity? Or bring the dead back to life.

programme.title: Johor Military Force
programme.desc: The Royal Johor Military Force is tasked with guarding the state of Johor and its king. Believed to be Malaysia's oldest and only state army, it has played pivotal roles in many historical events.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World
programme.desc: After being kicked out of the family business by his father, Forrest Mars claws his way back to create a multi-sector global empire, Mars Inc. Today that empire is worth over $47 billion dollars.

programme.title: The Unxplained With William Shatner
programme.desc: What could lie beyond the confines of the Milky Way? Are there galaxies similar to our own? Could they be capable of sustaining intelligent life? And is that life trying to contact us.

programme.desc: From priceless treasure found inside a lost city to an ancient manuscript hidden behind a wall, we explore secrets lost deep inside various unseen chambers, like tunnels, caves, or even burial sites.

programme.desc: As the season begins to change, one participant is forced to take on a massive project. Meanwhile, a pack of wolves interrupts the tranquility of the Arctic night and spells trouble for one survivalist.

programme.desc: In an early 20th-century America where soda is synonymous with cola, small-time soda maker Charles Leiper Grigg dares to take on corporate giants by introducing something entirely new.
